name: Glutinous Rice & Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the glutinous rice.
2. Cover with 10 cups water and soak for at least 6 hours or overnight. Drain.
3. Simmer adzuki beans in 3 cups water over medium heat for 40 minutes until tender but not mushy.
4. In a large pot, put coconut milk. Add salt and sugar and bring to a boil over medium heat.
5. Add the rice and cook, stirring constantly, until all the milk has been absorbed.
6. Cut bananas in half lengthwise, then cut each half crosswise into quarters.
7. Place 2 tablespoons of rice on the middle of each piece of foil. Flatten slightly and place a banana quarter on top.
8. Arrange adzuki beans around the edges. Add another 2 tablespoons of rice. Flatten to cover the banana.
9. Bring two long sides of the foil up to meet above the rice. Fold twice and press down on the rice.
10. Steam over medium heat for 20 to 25 minutes. Serve warm or at room temperature, still in the wrapper.
